endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Marketplace REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores
endpoints.description: Gets the list of available private stores
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}
endpoints.description: Get information about the private store
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the private store. All that is not saved will be lost.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}/offers
endpoints.description: Get a list of all private offers in the given private store
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}/offers/{OfferId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a specific offer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}/offers/{OfferId}
endpoints.description: Update or add an offer to the default collection of the private store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{PrivateStoreId}/offers/{OfferId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an offer from the given private store.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRIVATESTOREID}} with a real privatestoreid. Replace {{OFFERID}} with a real offerid.
